options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: difficulty
options.description: The logic difficulty for the slot. Higher difficulty = higher scores expected with less items.

options.name: max_score
options.description: The score of the last check in the slot.

options.name: goal_score
options.description: The score needed to goal the slot.

options.name: check_density
options.description:
The density of locations in the slot. Higher numbers means there are more checks, as checks will be more packed together.
Ex: Check density 1 may only gen 100 checks, but check density 5 might gen with 250 checks given the same max score.

options.name: all_in
options.description:
Creates one location for every score count, up to your max score.
Warning: This setting will override Check Density.

options.name: crit_items
options.description: The amount of important items in the slot. More coins, Score Multipliers, and Usables may appear on higher settings.

options.name: crystals
options.description: Adds energy crystal items to the slot, which are single-use reroll usables. Higher numbers increase the weight of these placed in the item pool after all progression items are added.

options.name: death_link
options.description:
When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.
Getting too many scythes in a line (i.e. getting negative score) sends a deathlink.
Receiving a deathlink will cause a loss of 1-3 coins, depending on max coin count.

options.name: add_points
options.description: Adds 'X points' items to the pool, which are points you start each run with.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
